site_scope_hint: Check the sites that are actually signed in for each profile in the Logged In column. If a keepalive run detects a site is signed out, that site will be unchecked automatically until you sign in again and re-check it.
site_checkbox_tooltip: Checked means this site should be included in keepalive for this profile.
mcp_detail_idle: Enable the checkbox above to start the daemon.
mcp_start_minimized_hint: Start minimized in the taskbar; click the browser if you want to watch it.
schedule_time_tooltip: While the app is running, profiles are kept alive each day at the scheduled time in the checked order.
chatgpt_hint_placeholder: If empty, the first older conversation in the left sidebar is used
warn_missing_user_data_root: Please fill in the User Data root directory in the base configuration first.
log_profile_bookmarks_initialized: {profile_name} initialized bookmark template and profile marker.
cannot_remove_entry_message:
This profile directory still exists inside User Data.
If you only want to stop using it temporarily, edit the account or disable keepalive instead.
If you remove only the GUI entry, it will come back on the next sync.
confirm_remove_message:
Remove entry {profile_name}?
Only the GUI record will be removed. The User Data directory will stay intact.
error_invalid_profile_name: The selected profile name is invalid.
info_keepalive_running_delete: A keepalive task is still running. Please wait before deleting this profile.
close_chromium_before_delete:
Chromium is still running.
To avoid file locks, close all windows of this Chromium build before deleting the profile.
confirm_delete_profile_message:
Permanently delete {profile_name}?

This will remove:
1. the GUI record
2. the entire {profile_name} directory inside User Data

This action cannot be undone.
log_profile_bookmarks_synced: {profile_name} bookmarks were synced from the template and the profile marker was refreshed.
log_keepalive_stop_requested: A stop was requested for the keepalive task{profile_suffix}. Waiting for the current step to exit safely.
tray_hidden_message: The app was hidden to the tray. Keep it running there to continue internal scheduled keepalive.
log_profiles_synced: Existing profiles in User Data were synced.
mcp_status_detail_running: Daemon online, worker ready. PID={worker_pid}, active requests={active_requests}, idle {idle_seconds}/{idle_timeout}s.
mcp_status_detail_guarding: Daemon online, worker not running yet; it will start automatically on the next MCP request. Last stop reason: {reason}.
mcp_status_detail_not_started: Enable the checkbox above to start it.
mcp_status_detail_starting: The MCP daemon is starting. Please wait.
mcp_status_detail_waiting: The daemon has started, but the status endpoint is not responding yet. It will continue probing automatically.
mcp_status_detail_stopped: The MCP daemon is not running.
log_mcp_prepare_start: Preparing to start the MCP daemon.
log_mcp_prepare_stop: Preparing to stop the MCP daemon.
log_mcp_external_reused: Detected an existing MCP daemon on the configured port and reused it instead of starting a new child process.
log_mcp_cleanup_stale: Cleaned up leftover MCP-related processes before starting/stopping MCP: {pid_text}.
log_mcp_force_kill: The MCP daemon did not exit in time. Forcing shutdown.
log_mcp_watchdog_not_running: Detected that the MCP daemon is not running; starting it automatically.
log_mcp_watchdog_port_down: Detected that the MCP port is not listening; trying to restart the daemon.
error_set_autostart_failed: Failed to configure startup on login: {error}
info_keepalive_running_exit: A keepalive task is still running. Wait for it to finish before exiting, or minimize to the tray first.
schedule_result_chromium_running: The scheduled time arrived, but Chromium is still running
schedule_next_run_when_ready: Will run automatically when conditions are met
log_schedule_waiting_chromium: Scheduled keepalive is waiting because Chromium is still running: {pid_text}
info_keepalive_already_running: A keepalive task is already running. Please wait.
